titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Fred H. Brice California Real Estate Papers
Fred H. Brice California Real Estate Papers
titlestmt.author: Sarah Lerner

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday August 31, 2019 at 03:05

did.unittitle: Fred H. Brice California real estate papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Collection of papers relating to the career of California real estate agent Fred H. Brice, 1923-1978. Includes 105 file folders documenting property transactions in Alameda County and Contra Costa County; 120 remittance receipts from real estate and insurance firm Mason-McDuffie Co.; an accounting ledger recording expenses and income; and a record book with tipped-in paperwork, including contracts and correspondence with buyers and sellers.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Marc Selvaggio, Bookseller on the Arthur Corbitt Hoskins Memorial Fund, 2016.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into three series: I. Property Transactions, 1949-1978. II. Remittance Receipts, 1940-1949. III. Other Papers, 1923-1949.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Fred H. Brice was a licensed real estate agent in Alameda County and Contra Costa County, California, circa 1923-1978. Brice was also a licensed California broker, handling transactions within the state. For most of his career, he was an agent for real estate and insurance firm Mason-McDuffie Co., which operated out of Berkeley.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Fred H. Brice California Real Estate Papers. Yale Collection of Western Americana, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards. For more information, please refer to the Beinecke Manuscript Unit Processing Manual.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of papers relating to the career of California real estate agent Fred H. Brice, 1923-1978. Includes 105 file folders documenting property transactions in Alameda County and Contra Costa County; 120 remittance receipts from real estate and insurance firm Mason-McDuffie Co.; an accounting ledger recording expenses and income; and a record book with tipped-in paperwork, including contracts and correspondence with buyers and sellers.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Fred H. Brice California Real Estate Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

subject.part: Real property -- California -- Contra Costa County

did.unittitle: Property transactions

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Series I is arranged alphabetically by seller name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series I contains 105 file folders documenting property transactions in Alameda County and Contra Costa County, California, 1949-1978. Original folders with annotations were retained in the series.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series II contains 120 remittance receipts from real estate and insurance firm Mason-McDuffie Co., 1940-1949.

did.unittitle: Remittance receipts
Remittance receipts
Remittance receipts
Remittance receipts
Other papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series III contains an accounting ledger recording Fred H. Brice's expenses and income, 1923-1949; and a record book with tipped-in paperwork, including contracts and correspondence with buyers and sellers, 1935-1944.

did.unittitle: Accounting ledger
Record book (loose papers)
